Why choose SWAPLAB?
Fast

Funds are typically sent within 15 minutes after user deposit is confirmed.

Easy

Select cryptocurrencies, provide your receiving address and sent your deposit. The system will take care about the rest.

Secure

Benefit from non-custodial service. We don't store your funds and no account is needed for cryptocurrency swaps.

Terms and Conditions
Check it Now
Frequently asked questions

What is SWAPLAB?

+ -

SWAPLAB is a non-custodial and beginner-friendly cryptocurrency exchange service, which allows users to exchange digital assets quickly, safely and easily.

How long does it take to receive my coins?

+ -

Coins are usually send within 15 minutes after user deposit is confirmed. It could take slightly less or more depending on network conditions. Please note that the number of required deposit confirmations is different from coin to coin.

How are the limits calculated?

+ -

Limits are based on our own reserves of a particular coin or token.

Can I integrate your exchange on my website or mobile app?

+ -

Please reach us via support form regarding business cooperation.

Exceptional Support Services

Check out our support portal or drop us a line in case of any questions. We would be happy to assist you.
